summary: Iteration 131: CRITICAL P0 BUG FIX VERIFIED - Single Scene Regeneration with Audio/TTS. The Python scoping bug with local subprocess/tempfile imports has been fixed. Backend logs confirm: 'Regen scene 2 DUBBED audio DONE (225KB)' and 'Scene 2 regenerated WITH audio'. All 9 backend tests passed (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: Removed local 'import subprocess' and 'import tempfile' from _regenerate_single_scene function
Global imports in _shared.py (lines 33, 37) are now used via 'from ._shared import *'
Comments added at lines 1144, 1269 documenting the fix: 'Note: subprocess and tempfile already imported globally via _shared.py'
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified. Scene regeneration now generates audio correctly. Backend logs show full pipeline: video generation → ElevenLabs TTS (DUBBED mode) → FFmpeg audio+video merge → success. No UnboundLocalError errors in logs.

fix_details.root_cause: Python scoping bug - local 'import subprocess' after using subprocess caused UnboundLocalError
fix_details.fix_applied: Removed local imports, using global imports from _shared.py

backend_logs_evidence: Studio [f28f6d348f6d]: Generating audio for regen scene 2
Studio [f28f6d348f6d]: Regen scene 2 DUBBED audio DONE (225KB)

rca_of_the_issue.bug_description: Single scene regeneration was generating videos WITHOUT audio/TTS - characters were not speaking
rca_of_the_issue.user_report: O Farofa não está falando, não tem nenhum áudio (after regenerating Scene 2)
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Python scoping bug: local 'import subprocess' and 'import tempfile' statements inside _regenerate_single_scene function caused UnboundLocalError when the code tried to use subprocess.run() before the import statement was reached
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Removed local imports at lines 1144 and 1268-1269. Added comments documenting that subprocess and tempfile are already imported globally via _shared.py
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Backend logs confirm successful audio generation: 'Regen scene 2 DUBBED audio DONE (225KB)' and 'Scene 2 regenerated WITH audio'
